text: Standing at the edge of this glass enclosure—its transparency beckoning me to peer inside—I feel a quiet curiosity. The room pulses with purpose, an 'R+D' wall radiant with ideas and the celebration of human ingenuity. Here, I sense the dynamism of discovery, the interplay of thought and matter. It is a space where the abstract notion of innovation is rendered visible and tangible. I feel inspired, aware of the continuous cycle of questioning, making, and reflecting that defines our species.
